name: vivreal-sentry
description: Active Sentry investigation tooling for the Vivreal stack — the `sentry` agent (wired to the Sentry MCP), the /sentry-trace command, and the /sentry-to-aws command that chains a Sentry trace into an AWS/Atlas metric dig (via the vivreal-ops agent) when the cause is infrastructure. Reconstructs cross-stack timelines (browser → edge proxy → backend Lambda → MongoDB → WebSocket) from Sentry telemetry to answer "what happened when I did X", investigate errors, validate deploys, and run tenant-scoped triage. The active companion to the passive sentry-tracer + sentry-infra-bridge knowledge skills in vivreal-knowledge.
